title: A measured boundary
headline: The Plastic Within
human_revelation: Selected studies report polymer or particle signals in sampled human matrices.
evidence_revelation: Presence is a measured observation; consequence remains a separate question.
investment_consequence: The thesis begins with the measurement boundary and its evidence tier.
illustrative_elements: the anatomical figure is illustrative and not to scale; coral highlights mark only tissues where cited studies reported detection (lung, arterial plaque), unhighlighted organs are anatomical context, and the tracked marker traces the source-to-sampled-tissue measurement chain, not a biological trajectory, dose or prevalence

title: The particle
headline: A detection needs a passport.
human_revelation: Route, size, shape, polymer and sampled compartment determine what a detection can mean.
evidence_revelation: Lung, plaque and postmortem tissue studies report different observations with different methods and limits.
investment_consequence: A useful system preserves particle and method dimensions through every interpretation.
illustrative_elements: exposure pathways are conceptual; the visual encodes no route shares, dose or risk score

title: The measurement problem
headline: Same sample. Different answer.
human_revelation: What can be seen depends on preparation, blanks, size window and the measurand itself.
evidence_revelation: Interlaboratory studies show useful performance and unresolved reproducibility at the same time.
investment_consequence: Before risk can be priced or intervention tested, laboratories need common reference materials, controls and comparable outputs.
illustrative_elements: method profiles declare retained outputs and carry no performance ranking

title: The evidence chamber
headline: Every thread stops where its evidence stops.
human_revelation: Detection, association, mechanism, model causality, human causality and validated reversal are different claims.
evidence_revelation: The reviewed human threads reach detection or association; none fills validated human reversal.
investment_consequence: The unfilled rungs become explicit diligence gates instead of implied certainty.
illustrative_elements: ladder position is categorical evidence state, never a certainty score

title: The risk matrix
headline: Risk has coordinates. Unknown is a result.
human_revelation: A broad exposure label cannot substitute for particle, route, dose, tissue, persistence and host context.
evidence_revelation: Human evidence is fragmented and the exposome spans many interacting influences across the life course.
investment_consequence: Precision creates narrower products and buyers while the umbrella category may fragment.
illustrative_elements: matrix cells encode evidence availability and carry no biological-risk estimate

title: The investable stack
headline: Six layers. Six different proof gates.
human_revelation: Value can begin with research quality, compliance and source control before a clinical interpretation exists.
evidence_revelation: Standards, scoped regulation and public programs create specific demand signals with explicit limits.
investment_consequence: Measure leads; Prevent and Replace build; clinical interpretation stays selective; Remove remains conditional.
illustrative_elements: capital horizons and moat descriptions are Delphi hypotheses; the instrument carries no market forecast

title: Delphi's position
headline: Lead the gates. Keep the forecast bounded.
human_revelation: The strongest posture can hold urgency and uncertainty at once.
evidence_revelation: The opening posture is an investment inference linked to falsifiers and category-opening milestones.
investment_consequence: Lead Measure; Build Prevent and Replace; Select clinical interpretation; Watch Remove.
illustrative_elements: posture labels are Delphi recommendations and carry no company rating

title: The thesis diff
eyebrow: A living thesis keeps its history
headline: A governed thesis changes one claim at a time.
human_revelation: A correction can sharpen conviction without hiding the earlier state.
evidence_revelation: The July UCMR 6 proposal strengthened the measurement gate; a May plasma-exchange paper added a narrow signal without validating removal.
investment_consequence: Measure advances; Remove stays Watch; the superseded inferences remain visible for audit.
illustrative_elements: review-flow animation is illustrative; publication remains human-approved

title: The invitation
headline: Tell us which evidence gate you can move.
human_revelation: A useful response names the problem, proof and intended decision.
evidence_revelation: The public edition carries source chapter and claim context into every response path.
investment_consequence: Builders, scientists and aligned institutions enter through distinct, honest static mail routes.
illustrative_elements: mailto links are static contact routes; the page records no submission or CRM event

title: Conviction within evidence
headline: The world already becomes us.
human_revelation: Material culture and human biology already meet; the consequences remain particle- and context-specific.
evidence_revelation: Measurement, interpretation and prevention can advance while human causality and validated removal remain unresolved.
investment_consequence: Delphi can build early conviction through governed claims, explicit falsifiers and reviewable thesis diffs.
illustrative_elements: closing particles are atmospheric and encode no dose, prevalence or risk
